subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Tea in Persian is a known thing, while in Turkish it signifies a mighty river and a great stream, and both [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی چای در فارسی معلوم و در ترکی نهر عظیم است و رود کبیر و هر دو
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @love of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
